news.headline: $250M raised by Avalanche in token sale for major network upgrade, with over 40 VC firms contributing before the "9,000" upgrade.
news.summary: Ahead of its significant network upgrade dubbed "9,000," Avalanche Foundation successfully raised $250 million with the support of over 40 venture capital firms.

news.headline: US commercial insurance market stable, but fragility persists due to natural catastrophes, social inflation. Buyers remain optimistic.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Kansas City, Missouri, it was reported that the commercial insurance market remains stable and predictable for buyers. However, there is a lingering sense of fragility due to concerns over natural catastrophes, increasing social inflation, and other uncertainties. Insurers and business leaders are closely monitoring these factors as they navigate the market.

news.headline: VIVOTEK ranks 14th in 2024 Security 50, the only Taiwanese company in top 20, marking its 12th time.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Taipei, VIVOTEK (3454-TW), a top security solution provider, maintained its strong performance by ranking 14th in the 2024 Security 50 list. It is noteworthy that VIVOTEK is the sole Taiwanese company in the top 20 of the list. This achievement signifies the company's consistent success, as this is the 12th time it has been included in the prestigious rankings.

news.headline: CTIA President and CEO Meredith Attwell Baker to retire in 2025 after serving since 2014.
news.summary: In a statement released today, it was revealed that CTIA, the wireless industry association, will see the departure of its President and CEO, Meredith Attwell Baker, in 2025 upon the conclusion of her current contract. Baker, who has been at the helm of the association since 2014, will be stepping down from her role. This announcement was made by CTIA President and CEO Meredith Attwell Baker.

news.headline: Toyota Kentucky invests $922 million in advanced paint facility, showcasing commitment to US manufacturing and sustainability.
news.summary: A company is dedicated to reinvesting in U.S. manufacturing, sustainability, and employment in Georgetown, Kentucky. On December 12, 2024, Toyota Kentucky announced a $922 million investment for a new advanced paint facility as part of their ongoing transformation.

news.headline: Inventor creates I N F I N I T I E accessory to transform shirts into stylish garments.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024 in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Quapaw, Kansas shared their inspiration behind creating the innovative I N F I N I T I E. This invention aims to easily convert ordinary, unflattering shirts into stylish and well-fitting fashion pieces. The design offers a solution to enhance the appearance of garments, with a focus on simplicity and transformation. The I N F I N I T I E presents a new way to revamp wardrobes and elevate personal style, potentially appealing to a wide audience looking to enhance their outfits.

news.headline: Always Best Care Senior Services opens new location in Camden, New Jersey, led by Munirah Ahmad and Steven Thomas. Aims to provide compassionate senior care.  #NewJersey #SeniorCare
news.summary: Camden, NJ - Munirah Ahmad and Steven Thomas are introducing compassionate senior care services to the area. Always Best Care Senior Services, a top provider of non-medical in-home care and assisted living referrals, has made the announcement on Dec. 12, 2024.

news.headline: Structural Heart Devices market projected to reach USD 25.69B by 2029, up from USD 16.31B in 2024, with 9.5% CAGR.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, it has been reported that by the year 2029, the worldwide market for Structural Heart Devices is projected to reach approximately USD 25.69 billion. This notable increase from the market size of USD 16.31 billion in 2024 signifies a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.5% during the forecast period. Driving this growth in the structural heart devices sector are various factors such as...

news.headline: Visual computing market expected to grow at 17% CAGR by 2030, with segments including gaming, healthcare, and defense.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India on December 12, 2024, it was reported that the Visual Computing Market is divided by type into On-premises and Cloud, and by application into Gaming, Media and Entertainment, Healthcare, Automotive, Manufacturing, Defense, and Intelligence. The Global Visual Computing Market is expected to experience significant growth in the coming years.

news.headline: Treasury bill auction for RIKV 25 0319 and RIKV 25 0716 on Auction Date from 10:30-11:00 am. Payments due by 14:00 Settlement Date. Bills delivered electronically same day.
news.summary: The Government Debt Management will conduct an auction on the specified date from 10:30 am to 11:00 am. Treasury bills in the Series, identified by ISIN numbers and Maturity Dates as listed, will be auctioned. Payment for the bills is required to be made to the Central Bank by 14:00 on the Settlement Date. The Treasury bills will be electronically delivered on the same day as payment is received.

news.headline: US National Security Adviser Sullivan: In my meeting with Israeli PM Netanyahu, I got the sense he is ready for a deal.
JDE Peet’s honored with 2025 Catalyst Award for Diversity Excellence.
DS Smith promotes holiday recycling as Americans improve paper packaging recycling; AF&PA reports 65-69% paper recovered in US last year.
news.summary: During the holiday season, there is an increase in wrapping paper, present packages, and shipping boxes being used and recycled by Americans at higher rates. Global sustainable packaging leader, DS Smith, has contributed to this trend through their circular infrastructure. Statistics from the American Forest & Paper Association (AF&PA) reveal that 65-69% of paper available for recovery in the United States was recycled last year. This data signifies a positive shift towards greater recycling efforts and sustainability in the packaging industry.

news.headline: EIA Natural Gas Change BCF Actual -190B (Forecast -172B, Previous -30B)
2024's Sandbox Awards showcase 20 winners in their largest edition yet. Discover the victors!
news.summary: The latest edition of the metaverse platform's awards features a record-breaking 20 categories, making it the largest one to date. Discover the winners of this prestigious event now!

New Political Trade Reported: UNP - Sell - spouse - $15,001 - $50,000 -  - Mike Kelly 
 transaction date: 2024-11-08

New Political Trade Reported: INTC - Sell - spouse - $1,000 - $15,000 -  - Mike Kelly 
 transaction date: 2024-11-08 
 filed at date: 2024-12-12
Orszag: Trump ready to change view on big M&A deals, says source familiar with the matter.
Tanmiah Food Company partners with Saudi Green Initiative to plant trees, supporting vision of 10 billion trees by COP16.
news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on December 12, 2024, Tanmiah Food Company disclosed its involvement in the 4th iteration of the Saudi Green Initiative Forum, which took place from December 3rd to 4th, 2024, centered on the theme "Action Is in Our Nature." The forum ran parallel to...

news.headline: Conagra Brands introduces badges on Healthy Choice products for GLP-1-friendly options, starting in Jan 2025.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 12, 2024, it was reported that there is a growing trend among Americans towards using GLP-1 medications for diabetes and weight control. Conagra Brands has revealed a groundbreaking initiative in response to this, marking a significant step in the food sector. As of January 2025, the company's Healthy Choice® range will launch a unique program to provide healthy meal options with lower calorie counts, aligning with customer preferences.

news.headline: Reworld™ acquires EnviroVac Waste Transport Systems, enhancing sustainable waste solutions; acquisition includes operations in Jacksonville, IL.
news.summary: In Morristown, New Jersey on December 12, 2024, Reworld™, a renowned sustainable waste solutions company, made public its acquisition of EnviroVac Waste Transport Systems. EnviroVac is a well-known provider of transportation services for both hazardous and non-hazardous waste, operating primarily in Jacksonville, Illinois. This acquisition marks a significant move in the industry, combining Reworld's expertise in sustainable waste management with EnviroVac's established presence in waste transportation. The acquisition is expected to expand Reworld's reach and capabilities, enhancing their services to a wider customer base.

news.headline: Toshiba showcases future retail solutions at NRF 2025, booth #3623, shaping innovations for tomorrow.
news.summary: Toshiba is welcoming NRF attendees to visit Booth #3623 at Research Triangle Park, N.C., to take part in the 'Create Your Tomorrow' showcase. At this event, visitors can explore the latest retail innovations that are projected to influence the future of the industry.

news.headline: Kolter Hospitality promotes John Beaton to EVP of Operations and Sara Martinez to SVP of Commercial Sales in Delray Beach.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, on December 12, 2024, Kolter Hospitality revealed that John Beaton has been promoted to Executive Vice President of Operations, while Sara Martinez has been promoted to Senior Vice President of Commercial Sales. Beaton previously served as Senior Vice President of Operations for almost seven years.

news.headline: Italy's prefabricated construction industry expected to grow by 3.5% in 2024, reaching EUR 17.00 billion, with a CAGR of 3.3% until 2028 according to a report by ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the Italy Prefabricated Construction Industry Business and Investment Opportunities has been released by ResearchAndMarkets.com. The industry in Italy is projected to experience a 3.5% growth, reaching EUR 17.00 billion by 2024. The report includes over 100 key performance indicators, market size, and forecasts related to end markets, precast products, and precast materials. The long-term growth outlook for the prefabricated construction sector in Italy remains promising.

news.headline: Turkey construction industry projected to grow by 3% in 2024 and 2.9% CAGR till 2028, reaching a market size of TRY 1.48 trillion.
news.summary: Dublin-based research firm ResearchAndMarkets.com has released a report on the Turkey Construction Industry, forecasting a consistent rise in the sector over the coming years. By Q2 2024, the market is projected to reach a value of TRY 1.48 trillion. The analysis conducted on market dynamics indicates a positive trend, indicating steady growth for the industry. The report provides comprehensive data on market size and forecasts by value and volume, including area and units, offering valuable insights for stakeholders in the construction sector.

news.headline: Costco rejects 98% of Teamsters' proposals on key protections as contract deadline nears on Jan 31.
news.summary: A deadline of January 31st is approaching for a company in Washington as they have been unable to reach an agreement on important protections with the Teamsters union. On December 12, 2024, Costco made the decision to reject a majority of the proposals presented by the Teamsters, which involved key issues such as seniority, inclement weather policies, and paid family leave. This deadlock in negotiations raises concerns as the deadline for reaching an agreement draws nearer.

news.headline: BTC Digital Ltd. (NASDAQ: BTCT) exercises over-allotment option in public offering, with underwriter purchasing 228,853 more shares.
news.summary: In Singapore on December 12, 2024, BTC Digital Ltd. (NASDAQ: BTCT), a company specializing in blockchain technology, revealed that the underwriter for its public stock offering has opted to acquire an extra 228,853 Ordinary shares.

news.headline: Important notice for joint replacement recipients using Exactech products like Optetrak, Truliant, Vantage, Connexion GXL, Equinoxe. Press release issued by Kroll Restructuring on Dec 12, 2024 in New York.Characters: 141
news.summary: Attention is required for individuals with implant or replacement surgeries involving Exactech products such as Optetrak, Optetrak Logic, Truliant, Vantage, Connexion GXL, and Equinoxe. A recent announcement from Kroll Restructuring on December 12, 2024 in New York emphasizes the significance of this notice for those affected.

news.headline: Oakley Spirits debuts limited 20-year aged Kentucky bourbon, honoring Annie Oakley's spirit, Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky on December 12, 2024, Oakley Spirits introduced its first product: The Rare Collector's Edition 20 Year Aged Single Barrel Kentucky Straight Bourbon. This release is a tribute to the daring and resilient spirit of Annie Oakley.

news.headline: Taoglas wins Elektra award for product design. Inception HP5354.A* antenna wins in high-reliability systems category.
news.summary: A company in San Diego, Taoglas®, known for its antennas and IoT components, has revealed that its Inception HP5354.A* antenna has been honored as a winner in the "Excellence in Product Design (High-Reliability Systems)" category at the 2024 Elektra Awards. These awards, organized by Electronics Weekly, celebrate notable accomplishments within the worldwide electronics sector. Baha Badran from Taoglas expressed gratitude for the recognition, stating, “Taoglas is truly honored to be acknowledged in the 2024 Elektra Awards program.”

news.headline: Fear and Greed Index: 52/100 = Neutral
Crypto Fear and Greed Index 83/100 = Extreme Greed
Rain Technology to showcase new display tech at CES 2025 in Las Vegas, impacting various sectors.
news.summary: In Boulder, Colorado and Las Vegas, a company is revolutionizing technology with implications for various industries. Rain Technology's innovations are set to impact enterprise, retail, automotive, financial services, medical, and consumer electronics sectors significantly.

news.headline: Global gaming industry growth has slowed to single digits from rapid 13% annual growth (2016-2021), per new BCG report.
news.summary: Recently released data from a BCG report reveals a significant change in the gaming industry's growth trajectory. The sector, which previously experienced a rapid annual growth rate of 13% between 2016 and 2021, has now shifted to a more moderate single-digit growth rate. This transformation reflects a notable slowdown in industry expansion. The report highlights how the gaming industry is currently facing a pivotal moment, as it adapts to this deceleration in growth.

news.headline: Research report added to ResearchAndMarkets.com offers insights into Microsoft Teams Phone ecosystem, detailing customer perceptions and decision-making factors in selecting communication solutions. Study specifically looks at adoption of Teams Phone compared to total sample adopting cloud PBX/UCaaS solutions.
news.summary: A new report titled "Growth Opportunities in the Microsoft Teams Phone Ecosystem" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report delves into customer perceptions and decision-making processes related to choosing communication solutions and providers, with a focus on the drivers and inhibitors impacting the adoption of Teams Phone. It provides a comparison between organizations integrating Teams Phone and the overall sample of firms embracing cloud PBX/UCaaS solutions. This study aims to offer valuable insights into the landscape of communication technologies, especially in regard to Microsoft Teams Phone.

news.headline: Global autonomous enterprise market projected to reach $114 billion by 2029, from $50.5 billion in 2024 - ResearchAndMarkets.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Autonomous Enterprise Market" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com offerings. The report focuses on solutions including Robotic Process Automation, Autonomous Networks, Accounts Automation, and Security Automation. It also delves into various business functions such as IT, Sales & Marketing, Supply Chain & Operations, and Accounting & Finance. The market size for autonomous enterprise is estimated to be USD 50.5 billion in 2024, with projections indicating a climb to USD 114 billion by 2029.

news.headline: Global Market Intelligence Database Market Model Subscription offers comprehensive info, trends, competitor analysis to cater all research needs. Access at the touch of a button.
news.summary: Dublin – An extensive "Global Market Intelligence Database Market Model" subscription is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. This database offers a vast array of integrated market information, serving as a comprehensive solution for all research requirements with a user-friendly interface. The Global Market Model AI Tool facilitates quick access to detailed market insights, encompassing market size, trends, drivers, restraints, and competitor analysis. This tool easily integrates with the platform, offering swift and seamless access to global market intelligence.

news.headline: Legion Technologies receives $50M from Silicon Valley Bank, bringing total funding to $195M for AI-Powered Workforce Management.
news.summary: Legion Technologies, a leader in workforce management, based in Santa Clara, California, disclosed today they have secured a substantial $50 million in funding from Silicon Valley Bank, a division of First Citizens Bank. This latest financing round has increased Legion's total funding to an impressive $195 million. The raise comes on the heels of a previous $50 million growth round that was spearheaded by Riverwood Capital earlier in the year. The company has been focused on enhancing hourly jobs and expressed gratitude for the capital injections received from investors throughout this year.

news.headline: Bitwarden enhances Teams plan with SCIM for real-time user provisioning, simplifying access control for organizations.
news.summary: Bitwarden, a prominent provider of password and secrets management, has unveiled an enhancement to its Teams plan based in Santa Barbara, Calif. The upgrade now incorporates SCIM (System for Cross-domain Identity Management) user provisioning, enabling organizations to streamline access control. This development aligns user provisioning functionalities with the existing directory connector feature, which is accessible in Teams and Enterprise plans. This move reinforces Bitwarden's commitment to assisting businesses in managing their sensitive data effectively.

news.headline: TetraScience and Snowflake collaborate to enhance Scientific AI adoption in life sciences, enabling seamless sharing of data.
news.summary: In Boston, TetraScience, a Scientific Data and AI Cloud platform, shared news of partnering with Snowflake. This collaboration aims to assist joint customers in capitalizing on their scientific data by leveraging the benefits of the Scientific AI revolution. By integrating the Tetra Scientific Data and AI Cloud with Snowflake's AI Data Cloud, organizations in the life sciences sector can now easily exchange scientific data. This partnership will enable them to uncover valuable insights that were previously inaccessible, fostering diverse and multifaceted discoveries.

news.headline: Coro had a successful 2024, securing $100 million in Series D funding, planning for more growth and partnerships in 2025.
news.summary: In Chicago, the cybersecurity platform Coro has had a successful year in 2024, signaling plans for further expansion and increased investment in partnerships in 2025. A key highlight includes the achievement of securing $100 million in Series D funding in 2024. This substantial funding not only solidifies Coro's position as a market leader but also aligns with its goal of offering strong cybersecurity solutions tailored for small and midsize businesses. The company looks forward to building on this achievement and capitalizing on the momentum in the upcoming year.

news.headline: FlexPoint launches AI-powered Same-Day ACH for 5x faster payments, expanding access beyond large enterprises.
news.summary: FlexPoint, a prominent provider of automated billing and payment solutions for managed service providers (MSPs) and their clients, has introduced AI-Powered Same-Day ACH payments in New York. This new service allows businesses to expedite traditional ACH payments and access funds on the same day. Victor Lopez, Founder & CEO of FlexPoint, expressed enthusiasm about the launch, highlighting that same-day ACH was previously primarily available to larger enterprises making payments. This innovation aims to provide broader access to expedited payment processing for businesses.

news.headline: TDK Ventures invests in ANYbotics, a leader in industrial inspection robots; focuses on transforming industrial operations.
news.summary: TDK Corporation's subsidiary, TDK Ventures, Inc., has made an investment in ANYbotics, a Switzerland-based company known for industrial inspection robotics. ANYbotics is renowned for its innovative approach in transforming industrial facility operations using advanced robotics technology. Their robots integrate top-notch hardware, artificial intelligence, and software to deliver efficient and fast return on investment for customers. ANYbotics has secured support from TDK Ventures, Inc., a move that signifies the growing interest in industrial robotics and technology advancements.

news.headline: NTT Research and NTT Scientists presenting at NeurIPS 2024 with 6 presentations, one as a Spotlight; top 2-3% of papers.
news.summary: NTT Research, a division of NTT (TYO:9432), along with NTT R&D, shared that their scientists will present six papers at the Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) conference. Notably, one of these presentations received the prestigious Spotlight designation, given to only the top 2-3 percent of submitted papers. The researchers from NTT R&D specializing in Computer and Data Science will be actively participating in the conference.

news.headline: T-Mobile & Deutsche Telekom reveal top 5 U.S. finalists for API Challenge, pushing innovation with 5G technology.
news.summary: T-Mobile, along with Deutsche Telekom AG and hubraum, has announced the selection of the top five finalists in the inaugural Telecommunications Network API Challenge in the U.S. The competition, which utilized 5G standalone (SA) network APIs, aimed at encouraging developers to design creative solutions for both businesses and consumers by leveraging advanced network technologies. This initiative highlighted the practical applications of these technologies in enhancing connectivity and services.

news.headline: Cooler Master reveals winners of 2024 Case Mod World Series in Taiwan, celebrating top PC modders. Platform for builders to innovate and personalize.
news.summary: In Taipei, Taiwan, Cooler Master, a prominent company in PC components, gaming peripherals, and tech lifestyle solutions, has revealed the champions of the 2024 Case Mod World Series. This annual competition showcases the talents of the best PC modders globally, showcasing their innovative designs that reflect Cooler Master's ethos of "Make It Yours." The event serves as a special stage for participants to exhibit their creativity, push boundaries, and actualize their most imaginative concepts. This year's Case Mod World Series has once again demonstrated the remarkable skills and vision of builders in the PC community.

news.headline: Ryan promotes 19 new principals, including Jeff Pickel, Tom Mescall, Azra Weintrob, Andrew Grove, Jason Patterson, Scott Tyler, and Graham Gilchrist.
news.summary: Ryan, a prominent global provider of tax services and software, has recently announced the promotion of 19 new principals across the firm. The promotions include individuals such as Jeff Pickel, specializing in Abandoned and Unclaimed Property Consulting in Boston; Tom Mescall, focusing on Client Services in Houston; Azra Weintrob, also in Client Services but based in London; Andrew Grove and Jason Patterson handling Complex Property Tax in Dallas and San Antonio respectively; Scott Tyler managing Personal Property Tax in Tampa; and Graham Gilchrist involved in Property services, among others.

news.headline: NY Senator George Borrello tours Eco Waste Solutions' Batavia facility producing ESWDS for US Army on Dec 9, 2024.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, New York State Senator George Borrello visited Eco Waste Solutions' latest manufacturing plant in Batavia, NY. The facility is dedicated to producing Expeditionary Solid Waste Disposal Systems (ESWDS) for the United States Army. Senator Borrello had the opportunity to tour the new facility and learn more about the production process. This visit highlights the importance of eco-friendly waste management solutions for military operations.

news.headline: Origami Sake partners with RNDC to boost growth amid rising demand. RNDC is a top distributor in U.S alcohol industry.
news.summary: A prominent distributor in the United States alcohol industry, Republic National Distributing Company (RNDC), based in Hot Springs, Arkansas, has teamed up with the fastest-growing American sake brand to boost category growth. The partnership, announced on December 12, 2024, aims to accelerate the expansion of the sake brand's reach and influence. With RNDC's extensive network and expertise, the collaboration seeks to capitalize on the increasing demand for sake in the market. This strategic alliance is poised to further solidify the brand's position with key players in the industry, spurring growth and increasing market share.

news.headline: AI server market to reach $837.83 billion by 2030, with CAGR of 34.3% from 2024 to 2030 - MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of December 12, 2024, the AI server market is projected to expand significantly. Starting at USD 142.88 billion in value for 2024, it is forecasted to escalate to USD 837.83 billion by 2030. This growth signifies a notable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 34.3% between 2024 and 2030. The surge in the AI server market is indicative of major advancements and investments in artificial intelligence technologies.
